content: agent1: implementing 'Add Template Path Validation' - adding validate_template_path() function and integrating into split_template_path() in src/jinja2/loaders.py. Will touch only that file. Let me know if you're also editing loaders.py.

agent1: got it, no conflict — my changes are limited to a new validate_template_path() function and a one-line addition inside split_template_path() (module-level, before the BaseLoader/FileSystemLoader classes). I haven't touched FileSystemLoader's __init__/get_source.
